name: caption-generator
description: AI-Powered Social Media Caption Generator with Analytics

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend:prod" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run dev
scripts.dev:backend:prod: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.prisma:generate: cd backend && dotenv -e .env.development -- npx prisma generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && dotenv -e .env.development -- npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:prod: cd backend && dotenv -e .env.production -- npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:seed: cd backend && dotenv -e .env.development -- npx prisma db seed
scripts.prisma:studio: cd backend && dotenv -e .env.development -- npx prisma studio
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed

author: Your Name
